title: Trouble screen, User Guide
scenario: User Guide button on Onboarding "Having trouble" screen does not open the device user guide web page
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. On the Onboarding screen, tap the "Having trouble?" link or button to open the Having trouble screen.
4. On the "Having trouble" screen, locate and tap the "User Guide" button.
expected: The user guide web page for the connected Poly device opens in the device's default web browser.
